mapper.update:
UPDATE T_ANCH_APPLY SET AUDIT_STATUS = #{auditStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FAIL_REASON = #{failReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, AUDIT_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, AUDIT_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AUDIT_TIME = #{now}
ID = #{id}

UPDATE T_ANCH_APPLY
LEAVE_ANCH_TIME = #{leaveAnchTime}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=DATE},
ID = #{id} and status = 0
